sentences.target: Franchement, c'est compliqué pour moi aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: Franchement, c'est compliqué pour moi aujourd'hui.
translations.en: Honestly, it's complicated for me today.
translations.es: Sinceramente, hoy es complicado para mí.
translations.de: Ehrlich gesagt, heute ist es kompliziert für mich.
translations.it: Onestamente, oggi è complicato per me.
translations.zh-Hans: 老实说，今天对我来说很复杂。
translations.yue: 老實講，今日對我嚟講好複雜。
translations.pt: Sinceramente, hoje está complicado para mim.
translations.tr: Dürüstçe söylemek gerekirse, bugün benim için karmaşık.
translations.vi: Thành thật mà nói, hôm nay thật rắc rối với tôi.
translations.nl: Eerlijk gezegd is het vandaag ingewikkeld voor mij.
translations.hu: Őszintén szólva, ma ez nekem bonyolult.
translations.hi: सच कहूँ तो, आज मेरे लिए यह जटिल है.
translations.pl: Szczerze mówiąc, dziś jest to dla mnie skomplikowane.
translations.el: Ειλικρινά, σήμερα είναι περίπλοκο για μένα.
translations.nb: Ærlig talt, i dag er det komplisert for meg.
translations.id: Sejujurnya, hari ini terasa rumit bagi saya.
translations.sv: Ärligt talat är det komplicerat för mig idag.
translations.ro: Sincer, astăzi e complicat pentru mine.
translations.cs: Upřímně, dnes je to pro mě složité.
translations.da: Ærligt talt er det kompliceret for mig i dag.
translations.fi: Rehellisesti sanottuna, tänään on minulle hankalaa.
translations.ja: 正直、今日は私にはややこしいです。

tokens.explanation: Sentence-level adverb expressing the speaker’s attitude; modifies the whole clause.
Clitic subject pronoun (elided before a vowel), referring to a situation; part of the copular construction c' + être.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person singular present) linking the subject pronoun to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective complementing the copula; default masculine singular describing the situation.
Preposition introducing the PP pour moi, marking perspective/affected person.
Disjunctive 1st-person singular pronoun functioning as the object of the preposition pour.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause, indicating the time frame.

sentences.target: Ton mot de passe est trop compliqué.
sentences.reading: /tɔ̃ mo də pas ɛ tʁo kɔ̃plike/

translations.fr: Ton mot de passe est trop compliqué.
translations.ipa: /tɔ̃ mo də pas ɛ tʁo kɔ̃plike/
translations.it: La tua password è troppo complicata.
translations.vi: Mật khẩu của bạn quá phức tạp.
translations.ar: كلمة المرور الخاصة بك معقدة جداً.
translations.el: Ο κωδικός σου είναι πολύ περίπλοκος.
translations.ja: あなたのパスワードは複雑すぎます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing with the masculine singular noun mot; marks 2nd person singular possession.
Head noun of the NP; part of the fixed compound mot de passe (‘password’).
Preposition linking the complement passe to mot, forming the compound expression.
Noun complement in the compound mot de passe; together with mot forms ‘password’.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person singular present) linking the subject NP to the predicate.
Degree adverb modifying the adjective, indicating excess (‘too’).
Predicate adjective agreeing with the (masculine singular) compound subject mot de passe.

sentences.target: Je trouve ce plan trop compliqué.

translations.fr: Je trouve ce plan trop compliqué.
translations.en: I find this plan too complicated.
translations.es: Este plan me parece demasiado complicado.
translations.de: Ich finde diesen Plan zu kompliziert.
translations.zh-Hans: 我觉得这个方案太复杂了。
translations.yue: 我覺得呢個計劃太複雜。
translations.ru: Я считаю, что этот план слишком сложный.
translations.he: אני חושב שהתוכנית הזאת מסובכת מדי.
translations.vi: Tôi thấy kế hoạch này quá phức tạp.
translations.nl: Ik vind dit plan te ingewikkeld.
translations.uk: Я вважаю, що цей план занадто складний.
translations.hu: Túl bonyolultnak találom ezt a tervet.
translations.hi: मुझे यह योजना बहुत जटिल लगती है.
translations.pl: Uważam, że ten plan jest zbyt skomplikowany.
translations.el: Βρίσκω αυτό το σχέδιο πολύ περίπλοκο.
translations.nb: Jeg synes denne planen er for komplisert.
translations.id: Saya merasa rencana ini terlalu rumit.
translations.sv: Jag tycker att den här planen är för komplicerad.
translations.ro: Mi se pare că acest plan este prea complicat.
translations.cs: Myslím, že tento plán je příliš složitý.
translations.da: Jeg synes denne plan er for kompliceret.
translations.fi: Minusta tämä suunnitelma on liian monimutkainen.
translations.ja: この計画は複雑すぎると思います.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person singular), preverbal.
Main verb (1st person singular present), transitive; takes direct object ce plan and an object predicative trop compliqué.
Demonstrative determiner modifying the noun plan.
Common noun functioning as the direct object of trouve.
Degree adverb modifying the adjective compliqué.
Adjective used as an object predicative after trouve, expressing evaluation of the object.

translations.it: I vostri moduli sono troppo complicati.
translations.vi: Các mẫu đơn của quý vị quá phức tạp.
translations.el: Τα έντυπά σας είναι πολύ περίπλοκα.
translations.ja: あなた方の申請書類は複雑すぎます.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person plural/formal), agreeing with the plural noun formulaires.
Plural common noun serving as the subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person plural present) linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Degree adverb modifying the adjective compliqués.
Predicate adjective in masculine plural, agreeing with the plural subject formulaires.
